name: Cassia Alata
summary: Internal cross-linking supports Cassia Alata through compounds such as aloe-emodin, chrysophanol.
description: Internal cross-linking supports Cassia Alata through compounds such as aloe-emodin, chrysophanol.
contraindications: digoxin or other cardiac glycoside medication because cassia alata's anthraquinone content may cause potassium loss with chronic or excessive use and affect cardiac glycoside safety
pregnancy because cassia alata has traditional abortifacient use and uterine-stimulant activity
long-term or high-dose extract use because animal studies have shown dose-dependent liver changes
